title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Carriage by Road Act, 2007. (2) It extends to the whole of India, except the State of Jammu and Kashmir*. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 20th July 2010, vide notification No. S.O. 1738(E), dated 15thAugust, 2010, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii).. *. Vide notification No. S.O. 3912(E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
